content: When true, requests will always use path style addressing.

comment.text: This translation key is used for a tooltip that explains the meaning of "force path style" in Amazon settings. When checked, this option ensures requests always use path style addressing. It appears as a tooltip when users hover over or click a button related to backup storage options.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: English ends with "." but translation ends with "u"

The word 'true' is translated as 'patiess' (meaning 'truthful' or 'honest'), which is a semantic error in a technical context. In programming/settings contexts, 'When true' refers to a boolean value being enabled/active.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Ja vērtība ir 'true', pieprasījumi vienmēr izmantos ceļa stila adresāciju

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The word 'true' is used as a literal boolean value in English, but in Dutch, 'Indien true' is grammatically incorrect and sounds like a placeholder error. It should be translated to 'ingeschakeld' (enabled) or 'waar' (true) to make sense in a UI context.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Indien ingeschakeld, zullen verzoeken altijd gebruik maken van path-stijl adressering.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Romanian translation is completely unrelated to the English source. The English text discusses 'path style addressing' for Amazon settings, while the Romanian text discusses 'authentication keys for connecting third-party services'.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Când este activată, cererile vor utiliza întotdeauna adresarea de tip path.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The phrase 'Če je postavljeno na pravilno' (If set to correct) is a mistranslation of 'When true'. In a technical context involving boolean values, 'true' should be translated as 'resnica' or 'vključeno'.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Če je vrednost resnica, bodo zahteve vedno uporabljale naslavljanje v slogu poti.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The word 'true' is transliterated as 'труе' instead of being translated or handled as a boolean value. In Serbian, 'When true' should be translated as 'Kada je tačno' or 'Kada je uključeno' to make sense in a technical context.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Када је тачно, захтеви ће увек користити адресирање путање.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The word 'true' is left untranslated in a way that makes the sentence grammatically incorrect and confusing in Serbian. In technical contexts, 'true' refers to a boolean value, but it should be integrated naturally (e.g., 'Kada je vrednost true' or 'Kada je uključeno').
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Kada je true, zahtevi će uvek koristiti adresiranje putem putanje.
